category_sources: Official JACK homepage describes JACK as a professional sound server API and daemon implementations for low-latency audio and MIDI connections.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses JACK Audio Connection Kit.
docs_sources: Official FAQ lists common setup, routing, build, and API questions.
Official JACK site exposes FAQ, wiki, API, downloads, and homepage navigation.
Official jack2 README points users to the JACK homepage and wiki for further information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/jackaudio/jack2, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official homepage says JACK provides real-time, low-latency connections for audio and MIDI between applications.
source_facts.description identifies the Audio Connection Kit.
